Package i5.cb.telos.frame

Interface AST_Node

  • All Superinterfaces:
    java.lang.Cloneable, java.io.Serializable
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    APathTarget, AQualifiedObjectName, Binding, ObjectName, PropertyTarget, RestrictionTarget
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AttrCategories, ComplexRef, Declaration, DeriveExp, Enumeration, ImmutableList, Label, ObjectNames, PathExp, PathTarget, Properties, Property, QualifiedObjectName, Qualifiers, Restriction, SelectExp, ShallowCloneableNode, Specialization, Substitution, TelosFrame, TelosFrames, TelosFramesIO, WithSpec

    public interface AST_Node
extends java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable
    Abstract base of all nodes of the abstract syntax tree that represents a telos frame

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.lang.Object clone​()
      All AST nodes are cloneable.
      java.lang.String toSMLFragment​()  
      void writeTelos​(java.io.DataOutputStream os)
      writes the text representation of this object (node and subnodes) in 'Plain Aachen' syntax.

    • Method Detail

      • writeTelos

        void writeTelos​(java.io.DataOutputStream os)
         throws java.io.IOException
        writes the text representation of this object (node and subnodes) in 'Plain Aachen' syntax. Writing into an OutputStream is *much* more efficient than recursively constructing a String. To write into a String, do the following:

        ByteArrayOutputStream bos = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
        DataOutputStream dos = new DataOutputStream( bos );
        frames.writeTelos( dos );
        String s = bos.toString();
        Parameters:
        os - the OutputStream to write into
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • clone

        java.lang.Object clone​()
        All AST nodes are cloneable. Most of them are immutable, thus their clone() returns a shallow copy.

      • toSMLFragment

        java.lang.String toSMLFragment​()
